[binaries]
# Meson 0.53.2 doesn't use any cflags when doing basic compiler tests,
# so we have to add -nostdlib to the compiler configuration itself or
# early compiler tests will fail. This can be removed when picolibc
# requires at least version 0.54.2 of meson.
c = ['ccache', 'clang-18', '-m32', '-target', 'thumbv7em-none-eabi', '-mfloat-abi=hard', '-mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16', '-nostdlib', '-ffreestanding']
c_ld = '/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-ld'
ar = 'llvm-ar-18'
as =  ['ccache', 'clang-18', '-m32', '-target', 'thumbv7em-none-eabi', '-mfloat-abi=hard', '-mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16', '-nostdlib', '-ffreestanding']
nm = 'llvm-nm-18'
strip = 'arm-none-eabi-strip'
# only needed to run tests
exe_wrapper = ['sh', '-c', 'test -z "$PICOLIBC_TEST" || run-arm "$@"', 'run-arm']

[host_machine]
system = 'none'
cpu_family = 'arm'
cpu = 'arm'
endian = 'little'

[properties]
c_args = [
    '-Werror=double-promotion',
    '-Wno-unsupported-floating-point-opt',
    '-fshort-enums']
c_link_args = [
    '-L/usr/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/10.3.1/thumb/v7e-m/fpv4-sp/hard',
    '-L/usr/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/11.3.1/thumb/v7e-m/fpv4-sp/hard',
    '-L/usr/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/12.2.1/thumb/v7e-m/fpv4-sp/hard',
    '-L/usr/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/12.3.1/thumb/v7e-m/fpv4-sp/hard',
    '-L/usr/lib/gcc/arm-none-eabi/13.2.1/thumb/v7e-m/fpv4-sp/hard',
    '-Wl,-z,noexecstack',
    '-Wno-unused-command-line-argument']

skip_sanity_check = true
default_flash_addr = '0x08000000'
default_flash_size = '0x00080000'
default_ram_addr   = '0x20000000'
default_ram_size   = '0x00020000'
